constraints.layout_style: unstyled div soup with inline styles only

required_complexity_patterns.notes: Phone split into country code select and local number input in separate wrappers
Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options
Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click
Inputs laid out in table cells, not flex card stacks only
Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root

reference_templates.title: Form inside dialog
reference_templates.notes: Application fields live inside a native dialog element
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Dialog form

reference_templates.title: Off-screen positioned input
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Off-screen input

reference_templates.title: Absurdly long label
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Long label

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Phone split into country code select and local number input in separate wrappers Required: Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options Required: Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click Required: Inputs laid out in table cells, not flex card stacks only Required: Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root Reference DOM (Form inside dialog): Application fields live inside a native dialog element Reference DOM (Off-screen positioned input): Input positioned at -9999px off-screen (accessibility anti-pattern) Reference DOM (Absurdly long label): Single field with 500-character label text Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: split-phone, custom-combobox, details-accordion, table-layout, shadow-host. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: unstyled div soup with inline styles only. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Form inside dialog; Off-screen positioned input; Absurdly long label.
